raw_content:
# circle

_Cqueues Internet Relay Chat Library for Everyone_

An IRC library with a goofy name. This project will likely stay in development
for a long time, as the only thing driving its development has a rather low
priority in my life. Nevertheless, proper documentation and tests are planned.
generated_summary: circle is a library for Internet Relay Chat (IRC) complete usually used in the fields of irc.
phase1: A Lua library for interfacing with Internet Relay Chat (IRC) networks
phase2: Provides functions for connecting to IRC servers, sending and receiving messages, and managing channels
phase3: Designed for developers who want to integrate IRC functionality into their Lua applications
